# Native api中导出的OpenGL ES 3.2符号列表

符号类型符号名_vFUNCglGetBooleanvFUNCglGetBufferParameteri64vFUNCglGetBufferParameterivFUNCglGetBufferPointervFUNCglGetDebugMessageLogFUNCglGetErrorFUNCglGetFloatvFUNCglGetFragDataLocationFUNCglGetFramebufferAttachmentParameterivFUNCglGetFramebufferParameterivFUNCglGetGraphicsResetStatusFUNCglGetInteger64i_vFUNCglGetInteger64vFUNCglGetIntegeri_
